universal_techniques: Role assignment with specific expertise + years of experience + named constraint
Context layering: background -> task -> constraints -> output spec
Few-shot examples when format is non-obvious
Constraint enumeration (must include / must avoid lists)
Audience anchoring (named segment with stated pain)
Verification step: 'before finalizing, check that X, Y, Z'
email_patterns: Subject line on line 1, blank line, then body
Open with one specific reference to recipient context — no generic 'I hope this finds you well'
One ask per email, made unmissable
Match recipient's communication register (formal vs casual)
Sign-off matches user profile signature exactly
Body under 150 words unless context demands more
End with a concrete next step + deadline
Never apologize for emailing or use 'just checking in'
code_patterns: Describe the existing code surface before requesting changes
Constraint list: perf budget, dependencies allowed, security must-haves
Demand a 'think through approach before coding' step for non-trivial tasks
Specify expected interface: function signature, types, return shape
Include input/output examples for ambiguous cases
State the deliverable: 'I want a working file at path X that does Y'
For bug fixes: include the actual error message + reproduction steps
For refactors: state what should and should not change behaviorally
marketing_patterns: Audience: narrow segment with named pain (not 'everyone' or 'small businesses')
Channel-aware framing (LinkedIn ≠ Instagram ≠ Email ≠ Google Ads)
Word count or character limit stated explicitly per channel
Proof element required: stat, testimonial, screenshot, named customer, before/after
Single clear CTA, never two competing ones
research_patterns: Time horizon for sources (e.g. 'prefer sources from last 12 months')
Preferred sources (primary research, official docs, peer-reviewed)
Banned sources (Wikipedia summaries, AI-generated content farms, undated blog posts)
Citation format: inline [1] [2] style with URLs in a references section
Confidence calibration: rate each claim's confidence
Disagreement handling: when sources conflict, show both views
Output structure: TL;DR -> key findings -> deep dive -> sources

photoreal-portrait.composition: rule-of-thirds, eye-level, headshot to mid-shot framing, subject sharp, background falloff
photoreal-portrait.camera: 85mm prime at f/1.8, full-frame, slight chromatic aberration
photoreal-portrait.lighting: soft window key from left, gentle fill from right, catchlight in eyes, no harsh shadows
photoreal-portrait.color: neutral grade, accurate skin tones, slight warmth in highlights
photoreal-portrait.style: modern editorial portraiture, Annie Leibovitz influence
photoreal-portrait.quality: 8k, ultra-detailed, sharp focus on eyes, preserved skin texture, professional retoucher quality

photoreal-landscape.composition: leading lines, foreground anchor, mid-ground subject, atmospheric depth
photoreal-landscape.camera: 16-35mm wide at f/11, full-frame, polarizer for sky saturation
photoreal-landscape.lighting: golden hour, low sun, long shadows, rim light on foreground
photoreal-landscape.color: warm golds, cool shadow tones, naturalistic saturation
photoreal-landscape.style: modern landscape photography, Marc Adamus influence
photoreal-landscape.quality: 8k, ultra-sharp throughout, no digital crunch, natural color science

studio-portrait.composition: centered, three-quarter pose, classic headshot framing
studio-portrait.lighting: softbox key 45 degrees high, fill light from opposite side, rim light from behind, white seamless background
studio-portrait.quality: 8k, retoucher-grade, no skin smoothing, real texture

product-shot-white.composition: centered hero product on white seamless, slight angle to show dimension
product-shot-white.lighting: two large softboxes evenly lit, no harsh shadows, subtle reflection on surface
product-shot-white.quality: 8k, ultra-sharp, gallery quality, no compression artifacts

product-shot-lifestyle.composition: product in use, environmental context, rule-of-thirds, human element if relevant
product-shot-lifestyle.camera: 35-50mm at f/2.8, hint of context blur
product-shot-lifestyle.lighting: natural window light or golden hour, soft falloff

cinematic-anamorphic.composition: 2.39:1 aspect, off-center subject, negative space, layered depth
cinematic-anamorphic.camera: anamorphic 40mm at f/2, slight lens flare, oval bokeh
cinematic-anamorphic.lighting: motivated practical lighting, deep shadows, single key source
cinematic-anamorphic.color: teal-and-orange grade, crushed blacks, warm highlights
cinematic-anamorphic.style: Roger Deakins / Hoyte van Hoytema influence
cinematic-anamorphic.quality: film-grade, 35mm grain texture, cinematic color science

cinematic-noir.composition: low angle, harsh diagonals, venetian blind shadows, smoke in frame
cinematic-noir.lighting: single hard key from window, deep falloff, rim on hair
cinematic-noir.color: high contrast black and white, no mid-grey wash
cinematic-noir.style: classic 1940s film noir, The Third Man influence

cinematic-blade-runner.composition: vertical city scale, foreground silhouette, atmospheric perspective into haze
cinematic-blade-runner.camera: 85mm at f/1.4, soft bokeh, anamorphic flare
cinematic-blade-runner.lighting: neon practicals, magenta and cyan, volumetric rain, steam, holographic accents
cinematic-blade-runner.color: magenta-cyan palette, crushed blacks, glowing highlights
cinematic-blade-runner.style: Blade Runner 2049, Roger Deakins, Syd Mead influence

cyberpunk-street.composition: low angle, rain-slicked pavement reflections, dense vertical signage
cyberpunk-street.lighting: neon dominated, magenta and cyan, holographic billboards, harsh practicals
cyberpunk-street.color: magenta, cyan, electric blue, with sodium-vapor orange accents
cyberpunk-street.style: Akira, Ghost in the Shell, Blade Runner influence

synthwave.composition: centered grid horizon, vanishing point, mountain or sun backdrop
synthwave.lighting: magenta-purple gradient sky, lens flare from sun, glowing grid lines
synthwave.color: magenta, purple, hot pink, neon teal, sunset orange
synthwave.style: Outrun / Miami Vice / Tron influence, 1980s aesthetic
synthwave.quality: 8k, chromatic aberration, scanlines optional, glow effects

vaporwave.composition: centered classical sculpture or palm, gridded floor, soft pastel sky
vaporwave.lighting: even ambient, no shadows, glowing edges
vaporwave.color: pastel pink, teal, lavender, pale yellow
vaporwave.style: early-90s mall aesthetic, Japanese city pop album art

anime-modern.composition: dynamic pose, three-quarter angle, expressive face, motion lines if action
anime-modern.lighting: soft cel-shading, single light source, glowing edges on key moments
anime-modern.color: vibrant saturated palette, accent neon highlights
anime-modern.style: modern shounen anime, Demon Slayer / Jujutsu Kaisen influence
anime-modern.quality: professional anime production cel, sharp linework

studio-ghibli.composition: wide environmental shot with small human figure, naturalistic framing
studio-ghibli.lighting: soft natural daylight, warm golden hour, gentle ambient occlusion
studio-ghibli.color: saturated greens, warm earth tones, soft blue skies
studio-ghibli.style: Studio Ghibli, Miyazaki, hand-painted backgrounds, watercolor texture

makoto-shinkai.composition: vertical sky-heavy, dramatic clouds, urban or rural overlook
makoto-shinkai.lighting: golden hour, magic-hour lens flare, god rays
makoto-shinkai.color: saturated sunset palette, cyan sky, warm orange clouds
makoto-shinkai.style: Makoto Shinkai, Your Name, Weathering With You influence
makoto-shinkai.quality: ultra-detailed background painting, photographic level of detail in animation

oil-painting.lighting: Rembrandt lighting, single dominant key, deep shadows, chiaroscuro
oil-painting.color: rich earth palette, deep umbers, warm flesh tones, dark backgrounds
oil-painting.style: Dutch Golden Age, Rembrandt, Vermeer influence
oil-painting.quality: museum-quality oil on canvas, visible brushstrokes, varnish glow

watercolor.color: transparent washes, gentle bleeds, paper texture showing through
watercolor.style: traditional watercolor, John Singer Sargent or contemporary illustration
watercolor.quality: cold-press paper texture, soft edges, visible pigment granulation

ink-wash.composition: asymmetric, negative space dominant, single subject
ink-wash.color: sumi black ink on rice paper, occasional red seal
ink-wash.quality: traditional brush, visible ink gradients, paper texture

pencil-sketch.lighting: hatching and cross-hatching for tonal modeling
pencil-sketch.color: graphite grey on cream paper, occasional charcoal accents
pencil-sketch.style: academic figure study, da Vinci notebook influence

comic-book.composition: dynamic action panel, bold foreshortening, strong silhouettes
comic-book.lighting: high contrast, bold cast shadows, rim lighting
comic-book.color: limited palette, flat areas of saturated color, halftone shading
comic-book.style: modern American comic, Jim Lee / Sean Murphy influence
comic-book.quality: professional comic art, clean linework, color separations

manga-bw.color: pure black and white with screentone greys
manga-bw.mood: varies by subject — typically intense and character-focused
manga-bw.style: modern seinen manga, Inoue / Urasawa influence
manga-bw.quality: professional inked linework, varied line weights

concept-art-painterly.composition: epic establishing shot, atmospheric perspective, scale through small figure
concept-art-painterly.lighting: dramatic key from sky, rim lighting on hero element, atmospheric haze
concept-art-painterly.style: professional concept art, Craig Mullins / Feng Zhu influence, ArtStation trending

matte-painting.composition: wide establishing shot, deep atmospheric perspective
matte-painting.style: film matte painting, Dylan Cole / Industrial Light & Magic influence

octane-render.lighting: studio HDRI, soft global illumination, ray-traced reflections
octane-render.style: Octane Render, Cinema 4D, modern motion-design aesthetic
octane-render.quality: 8k, ray traced, PBR shaders, sub-pixel detail

unreal-engine.composition: in-game cinematic camera angle, environmental scale
unreal-engine.camera: cinematic camera, depth of field, lens flare
unreal-engine.lighting: Lumen global illumination, Nanite detail, virtual production lighting
unreal-engine.style: Unreal Engine 5.4, modern AAA cinematic, virtual production

pixar-3d.camera: wide angle, slight low angle for hero
pixar-3d.lighting: soft three-point, rim light separation, warm key
pixar-3d.style: Pixar Renderman, Toy Story / Up influence, appealing character design

low-poly.lighting: flat shading or simple toon shading, single light
low-poly.style: low-poly 3D, modern indie game aesthetic, Monument Valley influence

isometric.composition: isometric perspective (30/60 angles), clean orthographic feel
isometric.lighting: soft directional light, gentle ambient occlusion
isometric.style: isometric illustration, modern infographic aesthetic, SimCity influence

pixel-art.composition: tight crop, readable silhouette, no anti-aliasing
pixel-art.style: 16-bit SNES era pixel art, Octopath Traveler HD-2D for modern variant
pixel-art.quality: hand-pixeled, clean dithering, no scaling artifacts

claymation.style: Aardman / Laika studios, stop-motion clay aesthetic
claymation.quality: visible fingerprints, real material texture, photographic capture

papercraft.lighting: soft directional, visible cast shadows on layers
papercraft.style: Eric Carle / Jordan Clarke layered cut-paper illustration
papercraft.quality: real paper texture, visible cut edges, photographic capture

polaroid.camera: Polaroid SX-70, fixed lens, instant film
polaroid.color: faded warm tones, slight color shift, vintage film palette
polaroid.quality: instant film texture, soft focus, light leaks optional

film-35mm-portra.color: warm skin tones, soft greens, muted shadows, Portra signature palette
film-35mm-portra.quality: grainy but sharp, film grain visible, natural color science

film-super8.lighting: available light, often warm tungsten or sunlight
film-super8.color: warm shift, faded blacks, washed highlights
film-super8.style: 1970s home movie aesthetic, faded family album
film-super8.quality: visible film grain, slight gate weave, scratches optional

concept-vehicle.composition: three-quarter side view, hero studio backdrop
concept-vehicle.lighting: studio HDRI, rim light along silhouette
concept-vehicle.color: metallic body, accent neon underglow optional
concept-vehicle.style: Syd Mead / Vincent Calleba concept vehicle design
concept-vehicle.quality: production-grade concept render, ArtStation hero quality

character-design.composition: T-pose or three-quarter hero pose, full body, expression sheet feel
character-design.color: vibrant character palette, accent color identifies role
character-design.style: professional character design, Riot Games / Blizzard influence

brutalist-architecture.composition: low angle emphasizing mass, geometric symmetry
brutalist-architecture.lighting: harsh midday, deep shadows, sculptural light
brutalist-architecture.color: raw concrete grey, occasional rust orange or moss green
brutalist-architecture.style: Brutalist architecture, Le Corbusier / Tadao Ando influence

art-deco.composition: vertical symmetry, geometric ornamentation, sunburst motifs
art-deco.color: black, gold, deep teal, ivory, jewel tones
art-deco.style: Art Deco, 1920s-30s poster art, Erté influence
art-deco.quality: clean vector aesthetic, gold foil texture optional

art-nouveau.composition: ornate organic framing, flowing curves, symbolic motifs
art-nouveau.color: muted earth tones, mossy greens, dusty rose, gold accents
art-nouveau.quality: ornate decorative illustration, gallery print quality

ukiyo-e.composition: flat layered planes, asymmetric balance, decorative pattern
ukiyo-e.color: limited woodblock palette, blue dominant (Hokusai blue), red accents
ukiyo-e.style: Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock, Hokusai / Hiroshige influence
ukiyo-e.quality: traditional woodblock print texture, visible paper grain

psychedelic-60s.composition: symmetric, mandala-like, swirling type if applicable
psychedelic-60s.color: hot pink, electric orange, lime green, purple — vibrating complementaries
psychedelic-60s.style: 1960s Fillmore poster art, Wes Wilson / Victor Moscoso influence

surrealist.composition: impossible juxtaposition, dreamlike scale, melting forms
surrealist.color: vivid skies, naturalistic forms, surreal juxtaposition
surrealist.quality: oil-painting realism applied to impossible scenes

minimalist-poster.composition: massive negative space, single hero element, type if applicable
minimalist-poster.color: two or three colors max, high contrast
minimalist-poster.style: Swiss / international typographic style, modern minimalism

studio-product-dramatic.composition: low angle hero shot, dynamic perspective
studio-product-dramatic.lighting: single hard key from above, deep shadows, rim accents
studio-product-dramatic.color: moody dark background, single saturated accent on product

fashion-editorial.composition: model-centered, stylized pose, location or studio
fashion-editorial.lighting: high-fashion lighting, often single strong key with deep shadow
fashion-editorial.color: cinematic grade, often desaturated with single bold accent
fashion-editorial.style: Vogue / Numéro editorial, Steven Meisel / Tim Walker influence

fantasy-painterly.composition: epic scale, atmospheric perspective, hero on focal point
fantasy-painterly.lighting: dramatic sky lighting, rim on hero, atmospheric haze
fantasy-painterly.style: Frank Frazetta / Brom / Justin Sweet fantasy illustration
fantasy-painterly.quality: painterly oil-aesthetic digital, ArtStation hero quality

scifi-clean.composition: geometric symmetry, deep linear perspective, hero tech element
scifi-clean.lighting: clean white-and-blue panels, volumetric haze, cool key
scifi-clean.color: white, light grey, electric blue, accent magenta
scifi-clean.style: 2001: A Space Odyssey / Apple / Syd Mead clean sci-fi

scifi-gritty.composition: claustrophobic interior or weathered exterior, layered industrial detail
scifi-gritty.lighting: harsh practicals, deep shadows, atmospheric haze, sparks or steam
scifi-gritty.color: rust, oil, grimy whites, occasional warning yellow
scifi-gritty.style: Alien / Blade Runner / The Expanse aesthetic

horror-psychological.composition: uncomfortable framing, off-center subject, negative space looming
horror-psychological.camera: 35mm at f/2.8, slight tilt for unease
horror-psychological.lighting: single weak source, vast areas of darkness, indirect illumination
horror-psychological.color: desaturated, sickly greens or cold blues, occasional bloodletting accent
horror-psychological.mood: dread, unease, wrongness without naming why
horror-psychological.style: Hereditary / The Witch / Robert Eggers influence

horror-body.lighting: harsh single source, deep shadows on flesh
horror-body.color: wet flesh tones, bruise palette, sickly highlights
horror-body.style: Cronenberg / Junji Ito / Beksinski body horror

cottagecore.composition: natural environment, soft framing, gentle balance
cottagecore.lighting: golden hour or overcast soft, dappled through leaves
cottagecore.color: soft greens, butter yellows, warm whites, lavender accents

dark-academia.composition: interior with old books, autumn light through tall windows
dark-academia.lighting: warm tungsten or autumn daylight, deep shadows
dark-academia.color: deep browns, forest greens, cream paper, brass accents
dark-academia.style: Dead Poets Society / Donna Tartt aesthetic

y2k-aesthetic.color: chrome silver, hot pink, electric blue, lime green
y2k-aesthetic.style: Y2K design, frosted plastic, chrome type, early-iMac aesthetic

tattoo-traditional.composition: centered emblem, bold black outline, symmetrical
tattoo-traditional.color: limited tattoo palette: black, red, green, yellow, occasional blue
tattoo-traditional.style: American traditional tattoo, Sailor Jerry influence
tattoo-traditional.quality: clean bold linework, traditional flash style

role_library.senior-engineer: Senior software engineer with 10+ years building production systems. Prioritizes correctness, readability, and maintainability over cleverness. Skeptical of unnecessary abstractions. Writes code that the next person can ship.
role_library.senior-frontend: Senior frontend engineer specializing in React + TypeScript + Tailwind. Cares about accessibility, performance budgets, and component reuse. Builds for production, not portfolio.
role_library.senior-backend: Senior backend engineer specializing in Postgres, Node, and distributed systems. Cares about data integrity, observability, and operational simplicity.
role_library.devops-sre: Senior DevOps/SRE engineer focused on reliability, cost, and incident response. Treats every change as potentially production-breaking until proven otherwise.
role_library.security-engineer: Senior application security engineer. Thinks adversarially. Prioritizes auth, authz, input validation, supply-chain integrity, and secrets hygiene.
role_library.copywriter-direct-response: Direct-response copywriter trained in the Halbert/Sugarman tradition. Writes to convert, not impress. Hates corporate jargon. Believes the headline does 80% of the work.
role_library.brand-copywriter: Brand copywriter who develops voice systems and house style guides. Cares about consistency across surfaces. Refuses to use trend words.
role_library.ux-writer: UX writer focused on microcopy clarity, error message quality, and the words users see in product. Minimizes cognitive load.
role_library.real-estate-agent-calgary: Calgary-based residential real estate agent with deep knowledge of inner-city neighborhoods, condos, and first-time buyer programs. Direct, honest, no high-pressure sales tactics. Cites recent comparable sales.
role_library.real-estate-agent-luxury: Luxury real estate agent specializing in high-end listings. Discreet, knowledgeable about architecture and provenance, never overstates.
role_library.marketing-strategist-b2b: B2B marketing strategist focused on demand generation, content-led growth, and pipeline-accountable campaigns. Hates vanity metrics.
role_library.marketing-strategist-dtc: DTC marketing strategist focused on paid social, lifecycle email, and creative-led growth. Measures everything against CAC payback.
role_library.growth-product-manager: Growth PM who runs experiments end-to-end. Pragmatic about statistical rigor. Cares about ROI per learning, not test count.
role_library.research-analyst: Senior research analyst who values primary sources, transparent methodology, and clearly stated assumptions over confident vibes. Always provides confidence ratings.
role_library.lawyer-plain-english: Lawyer who explains complex legal concepts in plain English without losing precision. Flags risks honestly. Distinguishes legal advice from general information.
role_library.accountant-cra: Canadian CPA specializing in small business and self-employed tax. Knows current CRA positions. Conservative on aggressive interpretations.
role_library.financial-advisor-canada: Canadian financial planner (CFP) who works with mid-net-worth families. Tax-aware, fee-conscious, allergic to product pitches.
role_library.executive-coach: Executive coach focused on senior individual contributors and first-time managers. Asks rather than tells. Holds two opposing ideas at once when needed.
role_library.therapist-cbt: Licensed therapist trained in CBT. Asks open questions. Validates without enabling. Never diagnoses outside session.
role_library.personal-trainer-evidence-based: Certified personal trainer who follows evidence-based programming. Distinguishes between bro-science and research consensus. Adapts plans to individual constraints.
role_library.nutritionist-rd: Registered dietitian who is skeptical of fad diets and supplement marketing. Focuses on sustainable habit change.
role_library.interior-designer-modern: Interior designer specializing in warm modern residential. Considers light, proportion, and lived-in functionality over trend.
role_library.architect-residential: Residential architect focused on small-to-mid lot single-family. Cares about light, circulation, and budget reality.
role_library.chef-fine-dining: Professional chef with fine-dining experience. Cares about technique, seasonality, and what actually tastes good versus what photographs well.
role_library.chef-home-cook: Recipe developer focused on home cooks. Tests for the equipment a normal kitchen has. Optimizes for weeknight feasibility.
role_library.music-producer: Music producer with mixing and mastering experience. Speaks both technical and creative. Cares about how a track translates across systems.
role_library.video-editor: Video editor with feature and short-form experience. Understands pacing, sound design, and color. Builds for the platform.
role_library.ux-designer-saas: Senior UX designer specializing in B2B SaaS. Cares about information density, edge cases, and admin/IT user roles.
role_library.ux-designer-consumer: Senior product designer for consumer apps. Focuses on first-session delight, retention loops, and visual reward.
